     the Fermi energy is     3.3240 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.94606842 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          7.2E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.23947483 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -192180.94385863 Ry
